description: First official curated-politics scenario for the 1836 start date. Global major-power tags with elevated depth in Europe, North America, and key colonial theaters. Geometry remains the modern Natural Earth scaffold; ownership is a curated overlay (quality tier curated-politics). Not Paradox-grade completeness: residual modern ISO baselines may remain outside priority theaters.
label: Official 1836 (Victoria-leaning curated politics)
license_lineage: Natural Earth public domain (geographic scaffold only)
notes: Historical ownership is a curated overlay; province geometry is unchanged.
Assignment precedence: baseline ← country_rules ← region_rules ← province_overrides.
Sea provinces are excluded from ownership tables.
